description: Classic Snake — arrow keys, fixed-tick game loop, speed increases with score.

description: Classic Tetris with a 60 fps game loop.

description: Simple todo list persisted to your workspace.

description: Markdown note composer and browser. Notes saved to your workspace.

name: Mind Map
description: Keyboard-driven mind map canvas — create and navigate idea nodes with vim-style movement.

description: Subway-style git commit history for the current repo.

name: Screen Time
description: Pie chart of macOS app usage from the last 7 days.

name: Stand Up Reminder
description: Background app that notifies you every 15 minutes with a random movement prompt.

description: Play audio files from the file browser — mp3, wav, flac, m4a, and more.

name: Video Player
description: Play video files directly inside Plexi with synchronized terminal output.

name: Storyboard

name: Parallax
